tasks.task_goal: Remove peeling paint from a wooden windowsill before repainting
tasks.expected_outcome: Loose and flaking paint is lifted off, leaving a smooth, bare surface ready for primer
required_tool_attributes: sturdy ergonomic handle for controlled force
sufficient blade width to cover surface

tasks.task_goal: Scrape baked-on food residue from a cast-iron skillet
tasks.expected_outcome: Carbonized bits are removed without gouging the seasoning, restoring a clean cooking surface
required_tool_attributes: slightly angled blade for low scraping angle

tasks.task_goal: Lift adhesive label residue from a glass jar
tasks.expected_outcome: Sticky film is sheared off the glass, leaving a clear, residue-free surface
required_tool_attributes: low-angle holder to maintain shallow approach
stiff blade retention to prevent flex

tasks.task_goal: Remove old silicone caulk from a bathtub seam
tasks.expected_outcome: Hardened caulk bead is stripped from the seam, exposing clean edges for new sealant
required_tool_attributes: hooked tip to get under beads

tasks.task_goal: Clear ice from a car windshield on a winter morning
tasks.expected_outcome: Ice sheets are shaved off the glass, restoring full visibility

tasks.task_goal: Lift dried candle wax from a hardwood table
tasks.expected_outcome: Wax flakes off cleanly without scratching the wood finish
required_tool_attributes: thin blade to get under wax
rigid enough to transmit shear force

tasks.task_goal: Remove a flattened wad of chewing gum from a concrete sidewalk
tasks.expected_outcome: Gum is separated from the concrete surface and lifted away in large pieces
required_tool_attributes: long handle for leverage and safe posture
secure blade mount to prevent flex

tasks.task_goal: Shave off dried paint drips on an interior door before finishing
tasks.expected_outcome: Hardened sags and drips are leveled flush with the surrounding surface

tasks.task_goal: Strip barnacles and algae from a fiberglass boat hull at the marina
tasks.expected_outcome: Fouling is removed, leaving a smooth hull ready for washing and inspection
required_tool_attributes: slightly angled blade for efficient shearing

tasks.task_goal: Clean burnt carbon off grill grates after a cookout
tasks.expected_outcome: Char and grease crust are scraped off, exposing bare metal bars
required_tool_attributes: grooved profile to match grate rods
rigid body to maintain contact pressure
long handle for leverage and safety

tasks.task_goal: Remove bark from a green branch to prepare a walking stick
tasks.expected_outcome: Bark and cambium layers are shaved away, revealing smooth wood beneath
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid blade with sharpened bevel
slight blade camber for continuous contact
stiff edge to transmit shear along grain

tasks.task_goal: Knock rust scale off an old steel pipe before painting
tasks.expected_outcome: Loose rust flakes and scale are scraped away, leaving a more solid surface for coating
required_tool_attributes: slightly angled tip for aggressive shear

tasks.task_goal: Strip packed mud from the treads of work boots at the entryway
tasks.expected_outcome: Mud and clay are scraped out of the soles, reducing tracked-in dirt
required_tool_attributes: textured, flat edges to catch debris
stable, anchored frame for foot-applied force

tasks.task_goal: Remove burnt-on spills from a glass-ceramic cooktop
tasks.expected_outcome: Hardened residue is cleanly shaved from the glass without scratches
required_tool_attributes: low-angle head to keep blade nearly flat

tasks.task_goal: Scrape hardened mortar squeeze-out along tile edges during cleanup
tasks.expected_outcome: Excess mortar is removed from joints and tile faces without chipping
required_tool_attributes: triangular or pointed edge for tight corners

tasks.task_goal: Remove an old vinyl window graphic from storefront glass
tasks.expected_outcome: Vinyl film and adhesive are sheared off, leaving clear storefront glass
required_tool_attributes: adjustable head angle for shallow approach
rigid blade clamp to prevent chatter

tasks.task_goal: Strip old gasket material from an engine block mating surface
tasks.expected_outcome: All traces of the old gasket are removed, yielding a clean, flat sealing surface
required_tool_attributes: narrow, stiff steel blade with square edge
rigid shank to prevent flex near the edge

tasks.task_goal: Scrape frost buildup off the inner walls of a chest freezer
tasks.expected_outcome: Frost sheets detach from the liner without gouging the plastic interior

tasks.task_goal: Remove dried construction adhesive blobs from a concrete floor
tasks.expected_outcome: Hardened adhesive is sliced off flush with the slab, preparing it for new flooring
required_tool_attributes: thick, rigid steel blade with sharp edge

tasks.task_goal: Lift dried tree sap from a car’s painted door without scratching
tasks.expected_outcome: Sap is gently separated from the clear coat, preserving the finish
required_tool_attributes: soft, rigid plastic blade to avoid marring
